name: rapidcam
description: Web-based parametric 2D vector editor — foundation for a CNC CAM program

scripts.test:unit: vitest run test/camBarHelpers.test.ts test/clearing.test.ts test/loops.test.ts test/midpointConstraint.test.ts test/pocketRegions.test.ts test/polylineConstraints.test.ts test/regions.test.ts test/transform.test.ts test/trim.test.ts test/trimShapes.test.ts
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:runtime
scripts.validate: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build
